grid.commands:
&XMLWhenGridShowingPrintRight;
select 'load$GridReport$(this);load$CheckingReport$(this);' as message return
select 'dispose$GridReport$(this);dispose$CheckingReport$(this);' as message return
select 'scatter$GridReport$(this);' as message return

action.text:
declare @stt_rec char(13), @d smalldatetime select @stt_rec = replace(stt_rec, '''', ''), @d = ngay_ct from kkyc with(nolock) where so_ct = @so_ct exec rs_GenerateStockTaking @stt_rec, '', @@language, @@userID, @@admin
select 1 return

declare @q nvarchar(4000), @k varchar(4000), @filter varchar(4000), @d smalldatetime, @t varchar(9), @stt_rec char(13), @unitKey nvarchar(4000), @siteKey nvarchar(4000), @key nvarchar(4000), @del_yn int select @stt_rec = replace(stt_rec, '''', ''), @d = ngay_ct from kkyc with(nolock) where so_ct = @so_ct select @t = 'kkss$' + rtrim(year(@d)), @k = '' if exists(select 1 from @r where datalength(text) < 2049) select @k = replace(cast(text as varchar(2048)), '''', '') from @r else select * into #r from @r select @filter = ' and ' + case when @k = '' then 'exists(select 1 from #r where ' else '' end + 'patindex(''%,'' + rtrim(%alias$ma_kho) + '' '' + rtrim(%alias$ma_vi_tri) + '' '' + rtrim(%alias$ma_lo) + '' '' + rtrim(%alias$ma_vt) + '',%'', ' + case when @k = '' then 'text) > 0)' else '''' + @k + ''') > 0' end
if object_id(@t) is not null begin&SetKeyRight; select @key = @key + replace(@filter, '%alias$', 'a.') select @key = dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$GetCheckKey(@key)&CheckKeyRight; select @q = 'delete ' + @t + ' where stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' select @q = @q + replace(@filter, '%alias$', '') exec sp_executesql @q end
select 1 return

declare @q nvarchar(4000), @d smalldatetime, @t varchar(9), @stt_rec char(13), @unitKey nvarchar(4000), @siteKey nvarchar(4000), @key nvarchar(4000), @del_yn int select @stt_rec = replace(stt_rec, '''', ''), @d = ngay_ct from kkyc with(nolock) where so_ct = @so_ct select @t = 'kkss$' + rtrim(year(@d))
if object_id(@t) is not null begin &SetKeyRight; &CheckKeyRight;
select @q = 'delete ' + @t + ' where stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' exec sp_executesql @q end
select 1 return
